title: Garden Route Dam level at 43.75%
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Households are limited to 10 kilolitres per month under Level 2D. Small daily savings, shorter showers, fewer washes, using grey water, can make a big difference."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS -  The latest dam level update, supplied by George Municipality on 4 February:","html":"GEORGE NEWS - The latest dam level update, supplied by George Municipality on 4 February:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Dam Level","html":"Garden Route Dam Level"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dam level: 43,75 %  (Compared to 44.77% on 27 January) Rainfall: 0.5 mm (Measured from 26 January – 2 February)","html":"

teaser: Households are limited to 10 kilolitres per month under Level 2D. Small daily savings, shorter showers, fewer washes, using grey water, can make a big difference.
featuredCaption: Garden Route Dam. Photo: Maggie du Plessis
